description: This is the main source file for the Dashboard screen of a React Native app, defining the UI structure, layout, styling, and component interactions for the dashboard, including roadmap, chat, and metrics panels.

methods.name: StatusPill
methods.description: A React component that displays a status indicator pill based on the roadmap item status.

methods.name: RoadmapPanel
methods.description: A React component that renders the roadmap items with status indicators.

methods.name: ChatPanel
methods.description: A React component that manages and renders AI chat messages with quick action buttons.

methods.name: MetricsPanel
methods.description: A React component that displays startup status metrics.

methods.name: MetricRow
methods.description: A small component to display a single metric label and value.
